#  Create a User Account in the Project Directory 
#####  In Beta
A redesigned version of the Project Directory is currently in beta and can be enabled with[ Procore Explore](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/manage-features-with-procore-explore).
##  Background 
A Procore user profile lets a person log in to the platform. You can create a new user in the Company or Project directory. Once a user is added to a Project Directory, they can perform actions based on their assigned permissions.
When a user is added in the project's Directory. They are also added to the company's Directory. If the user already exists in the Company Directory, you can [add them to your project's Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/add-user-account-to-project-directory) instead.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/permissions)
  * Users created in the Project level Directory tool are also automatically added to the Company level Directory tool.
  * To bulk import users, you can request an import, or import users directly.
    * [Request Company and People Imports](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/request-company-and-people-imports/).
    * [Import Users & Vendors into your Project Level Directory Tool (Procore Imports)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-imports/tutorials/import-users-vendors-into-your-project-level-directory-tool-procore-imports).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Add User**.  
OR  
![Beta Feature](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1efcb072e8c800fab58e44a7014a7f88/92ea81b07784904a0f488922049b31f9/beta-feature.png?fm=webp)  
Click **Add** and select **Add User**.
  3. Complete the form.  
_Note:_ Additional fields configured by your company may be displayed or required. See [Create New Configurable Fieldsets](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-new-configurable-fieldsets).  
_Beta Note:_ If you do not have permissions to assign permissions templates, you can only assign the default template for the project.
     * **First Name**. Enter the new user's first name.
     * **Last Name**. Enter the new user's last name.
     * **Email Address**. Enter the new user's email address. This will be the email that they use to log in to Procore. In order to add the record, the email address entry must use the proper format (e.g., jsmith@example.com).
     * **Permission Template**. Select a permissions template.  
_Beta_ _Note:_ If you do not have permissions to assign permissions templates, you can only assign the default template for the project.
  4. Click **Save**.  



##  Next Steps 
  1. [Edit the user's account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/edit-a-user-account-in-the-project-directory) to provide additional information.
  2. [Edit a User's Default Email Notifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/edit-a-users-default-email-notifications-in-the-project-directory)
  3. [Configure Schedule Notification Emails](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/schedule-project/tutorials/configure-schedule-notification-emails)
  4. [Invite the user to your project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/invite-or-reinvite-a-person-to-a-project).


## See Also
  * [Add a User Account to the Project Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/add-user-account-to-project-directory)
  * [Invite or Reinvite a User to Join a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/invite-or-reinvite-a-person-to-a-project)
  * [Configure the Project Team on the Project Home Page](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/configure-a-project-team-on-the-project-home-page)
title: Create a User Account in the Project Directory
description: How to create a new user account in Procore's Project Directory tool.
